epigraph.quote: Charles bounces about like a relaxed pea.

moments.quote: at 9.0 we stopped for breakfast on Bewdley by-pass

moments.place: Upper Cantref Farm, Brecon Beacons, Wales, UK
moments.quote: It started raining just as William + Simon finished putting up the tents.
Inspite of the rain, it was a super half-term camping trip.
